titleStmt.title: SII 5.1358: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1358. (A.R. No. 403 of 1896). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE. This inscription is built in in the middle.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . vyakrīṇāccha tavimśa tikāśaissomasya vṛṣalasya vaṭukamaha raśaḥ . kovirā cakecaripaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājādhirājade varkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattu
Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār koyilil maṭamuṭaiya caturāṉaṉapaṇṭitaṉum śrīmāhe ṭāṉum śrīkāriyam Ariyapirāṉpaṭṭaṉum comacittāntam vakkāṇikkum vāgīśvara paṇṭitaṉum kālum piṭāruñ ceyṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala piṭāraṉu
n tiruvoṟṟiyūrp piccaṉuṅ koyilnāyakam paṭampakkanāyakapaṭṭaṉum koyiṟkaṇakkut tiru ṭayār tiruppaṅkūṉiyuttirattu Āṟān tirunāḷāṉa putaṉkiḻamaiyum Ekātaciyum peṟṟa Āyilaiyatti ṉaṉṟu paṭampakkanāyakatevar tirumakiḻiṉkiṭ tiruvolakkañ ceyteḻuntaru
ḷi yiruntu Āḷuṭaiyanampi ṣripurāṇaṅ keṭṭaruḷā niṟka Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam vaṭukap perumpākkattukkāṇi yeṉṟu viṇṇappañceyya nammurkaḷil Iraṇaiyūr Amutaṅ kiḻavaṉ periyāṉ comaṉukkut taṇṭicaṉ vilaiyāka viṟṟuk kāṇiyākak koṭukkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻi
ntaruḷa Ivvūrkkuk kāṇivilai Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu nūṟṟirupatum śrīpaṇṭārattoṭukkuk koṇṭu Ivva ḻavaṉ periyāṉ comanukku śrīpaṇṭārat tiṟai yiṟukkavum Ivanukku mivaṉ vaṁśa ttārkkum viṟṟoṟṟipritikra yattuk kurittāvatāka viṟṟukkoṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivai ma
ṭamuṭaiya caturānanapaṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu ....ippaṭikku Ivai tiruviti veyiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu . ṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai comacittāntam vakkāṇikkum vāgīśva rapaṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai kālum piṭārañ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala piṭāraṉ Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭik
ku Ivai tiruvoṟṟiyūrp piccaṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai koyilnāyakam paṭampakkanāyakapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .. ṉ Uṟavākkiṉāṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 5.1358 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
